curation_notes: Patch commit 49723f6 changed 8 files total, but only 4 contain security-relevant code changes: includes/class-db.php (core SQL query construction added sanitize_sql_orderby), core/admin/tables/class-logtable.php (changed sanitize_text_field to sanitize_key for order and sanitize_sql_orderby for orderby), core/admin/tables/class-blockedlocations.php and class-blockedtable.php (changed sanitize_text_field to sanitize_key for order). The remaining files were comment changes, version bumps, and changelog updates. The pre-assigned sql-injection class matches the CWE-89 and the patch diff, which clearly fixes unsanitized SQL ORDER BY interpolation.
